unsubscribe.title: Unsubscribe
unsubscribe.description: We're sorry to see you go. Are you sure you want to unsubscribe {email} from receiving emails?
unsubscribe.successDescription: {email} has been unsubscribed. You won't receive any more emails from us.

subscribe.title: Subscribe to updates
subscribe.description: Would you like to subscribe {email} to receive emails?
subscribe.successDescription: {email} is now subscribed to receive emails from us.

manage.title: Manage Preferences
manage.subscribedStatus: You are currently subscribed to receive emails
manage.unsubscribedStatus: You are currently unsubscribed from emails
manage.disclaimer: This page allows you to manage your email preferences. Your subscription status is updated in real-time.

footer.unsubscribeText: You received this email because you agreed to receive emails from {projectName}. If you no longer wish to receive emails like this, please
